meaning: n.[药]匹鲁卡品,毛果芸香碱(一种眼科缩瞳药)
examples: The results showed that pilocarpine was also an inhibitor of platelet aggregation.
Objective To compare the myotic effects of physostigmine, pilocarpine and neostigmine in rabbits.
AIM: To establish the mouse models with acute epilepsy induced by pilocarpine, and explore the characteristics.
